name: a4u-downloader
description: Downloader per le risorse didattiche dei corsi completati di Avatar4University.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c yellow,cyan -k "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w client run build && npm -w server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck
